productDisplayName: ADIDAS Originals Men Superstar 2 Lite logo Black Casual Shoes
description: A vintage streetwear classic with a shell toe silhouette, the Superstar Lite Logo shoe from Adias Originals is a fabulous style take on the original Basketball shoe of the 1970s. With a patterned heel piece, contrast stripes and the adidas Terfoil logo, these trainers are at home when at the gym and on the dance floor. Try it with dark jeans and an adidas hoodie for a bad boy look.UpperLeather upper with Adidas patented 3-Stripes in contrast colour on the sides of the midfootRidged and grooved toe cap with a shell toe silhouetteLacing system for a snug, customised FitPadded collar and tongue for breathable comfort and optimum fitPadded footbed for all-day comfortChequered overlays on the backfootMidsoleMoulded midsole detailing for vintage style and impact protectionOutsolePatterned TPR outsole with herringbone grooves for absolute durability, grip and tractionShoe careWipe surface using a dry, clean clothDo not store in direct sunlight
